description: Register a Vanta API v1 resource (OAuth2 client-credentials, cached + auto-refreshed) for use by other components

resource_key.label: Resource Key
resource_key.description: Key used to register this resource. Other components reference it via resource_name / resource_key.

client_id_env_var.label: Client ID Env Var
client_id_env_var.description: Env var holding Vanta OAuth client_id

client_secret_env_var.label: Client Secret Env Var
client_secret_env_var.description: Env var holding Vanta OAuth client_secret

api_base_url.label: API Base URL
api_base_url.description: Vanta API base URL (override for staging / regional tenants)

name: Vanta Resource
